name: Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions: This recipe yields excellent results when made in a Welbilt or Hitachi bread maker. For best outcomes, ensure your machine is clean and pre-programmed with the correct settings before starting. Add all ingredients to the bread pan as directed by your appliance's manual. Once the dough has formed, allow it to rise for approximately 30 minutes. If you have not already placed the lid on your machine, proceed to do so now. Set the timer according to your bread maker's instructions and wait until baking is complete. Carefully remove the cooked bread from its pan and let cool before slicing and serving.
